def: s.m. Care, caution; protection, defence, patronage; — intj. Take care! beware! mind! — adv. (followed by neg. na), By no means, on no account; never.
intj. = زنہار zinhār, q.v. s.m. Care, caution; protection, defence, patronage; — intj. Take care! beware! mind! — adv. (followed by neg. na), By no means, on no account; never.
adv. By no means; never.
see زينـہ‍ار zīnhār.
1. s. m. Care, caution, protection, defence, patronage. 2. interj. Take care, beware. adv. By no means.
s.f. Fringe, border, edging.

ety: for जिड़ = जड
def: s.f. = zaṭal, q.v. s.f. Chattering, chatter, foolish prating, nonsense, false oridle stories, quibbling, tattle
subs: s.m. One who talks nonsense; one who tells false and idle stories
zaṭal hāṅknā, v.n. To talk nonsense; to quibble; to tell false and idle stories.

ety: = zer, q.v.
def: s.f. A fine, soft, or low sound; acute tone; under-tone; — the smallest string (of a lute, &c.); the treble (in music)
more: n. f. 1. The shortest string in a lute, etc. 2. A fine soft sound; the treble. zīr o bam . 1. A pair of small kettledrums. 2. Low and high notes.
s. f. A fine soft sound, the smallest string of a lute, &c., the treble (in musick).
subs: adv. With a soft or low sound, softly
Low and high notes; — a pair of small kettle-drums.

def: s.m. = زيره zīra, q.v. (v.n. fr. ذرع 'to stretch forth the arm'), s.m. lit. 'The arm from the elbow to the tip of the middle finger'; a cubit; a yard; — the two bright stars α and β in the heads of Gemini; the seventh mansion of the moon.

ety: = S. जीर
def: s.m. Cummin-seed; — pollen (of a flower)
more: n. m. S. जीर to digest. 1. Commin-seed. 2. Pollen. zīra-safaid , n. m. Cuminum cyminum . Wat. zīra-i-siyāh , n. m. Carraway seeds.
subs: s.m. Cummin-water, solution of cummin-seeds; a mixture of ground cummin-seed, dry ginger, mint, assafœtida, dried green mangoes, salt, and chillies, dissolved in water (taken as a digestive).

def: (v.n. fr. ذرع 'to stretch forth the arm'), s.m. lit. 'The arm from the elbow to the tip of the middle finger'; a cubit; a yard; — the two bright stars α and β in the heads of Gemini; the seventh mansion of the moon.
more: s. m. 1. A yard. 2. A cubit. 3. Two bright stars in the head of Gemini.

ety: for A. زراعة, inf. n. of زرع 'to sow,' &c.
def: s.f. Sowing, tilling; tillage, husbandry, agriculture; a sown or cultivated field, sown land; a standing crop
more: n. f. زرع he sowed. 1. Tillage ( bo-jot ). 2. A cultivated farm or field; sown land; the standing crop. zirāat-pesha ; H. kisān , An agriculturist. zirāٴat k .; H. khetī k. , v. a. To cultivate; grow crops; to reclaim (land).
(from زرع Heb. To scatter seed, to sow) s. f. Agriculture, husbandry, sowing, sown field, sown land, crop.
subs: s.m. One whose business or occupation is sowing or tilling, husbandman, agriculturist
(-kī), To till, to cultivate; to grow crops; to reclaim (land).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian زِرَاعَت (zirā'at), from Arabic زِرَاعَة (zirāʕa).

ety: inf. n. of ضارب, iii of ضرب 'to strike,' &c.
def: s.m. Contending, fighting, fencing; conquering; — (inf. n. of ضرب 'to cover' (a camel)), coitus.
more: (from ضرب) 1. s. m. Fighting, fencing, conquering. 2. Coitus. ¶ ẓarrāb, A coiner, a mint-master.

ety: Pārsī zreh; Pehl. zrāe; Zend zrādha, fr zrād = S. ह्राद्
def: s.f. Iron armour made with rings, chain-armour
more: n. m. Chain armour. zirah-posh . A man in armour.
(prop. zirih ) s. f. Iron armour made with rings. زره پوش zirah-posh, A man in armour.
subs: adj. & s.m. Clothed in chain-armour, mailed; — a man clad in armour

ety: prob. zer or zīr, q.v.+ak = S. अक
def: adj. Acute, shrewd, sharp, quick, smart, quick in understanding, ingenious, intelligent, sagacious, penetrating.
more: adj. Ingenious, intelligent, sagacious, penetrating, acute, shrewd.

def: s.f. Acuteness, acumen, quickness, ingenuity, intelligence, discernment, sagacity.
more: s. f. Ingenuity, sagacity, acumen, acuteness, discernment.

r: zīrā-ki, zī, az, ra, rāʼe?, ki
ety: zī = az+ra = rāʼe?+ki
def: conj. For the reason that, because that, because, since, on account of.
s.m. = zaṭallī, q.v. s.m. One who talks nonsense, &c. ( = zaṭal-bāz).

ety: for A. ذروة, fr. ذرو or ذري 'to be raised,' &c.
def: s.f. Top of a camel's hump; summit (of a mountain, &c.), pinnacle; — much wealth, opulence (cf. s̤arwat); — majesty, pomp.
more: s. f. 1. The summit, pinnacle. 2. Majesty, pomp.

ety: Pārsī zist; Zend zoizhda, fr. zizhdā, rt. zish; cf. S. जिष्
def: adj. Ugly, unseemly, hideous; deformed; inhuman; obscene, filthy
more: adj. Deformed, ugly, inhuman, hideous. زشت خو zisht-ḵẖū, Of ugly habits or disposition. زشت رو zisht-rū, adj. Ugly.
subs: adj. Of ugly habits; of a wicked disposition; bad-tempered
adj. & s.m. Foul-tongued; — an obscene speaker.

def: s.f. Ugliness; deformity; — evil, ill; wickedness; trouble, sorrow, woe.

ety: v.n. of zīstan = zīvastan = zīv-hastan; rt. Zend and S. jīv+S. अस्+aff. तं
def: s.f. Living, life, existence
more: (from زيستن) s. f. Life, living. زيست کرنا zīst karnā, To live.

ety: v.n. fr. ضوأ 'to give light'
def: s.f. Light; brilliancy, splendour, resplendence.
more: s. f. Light, splendour, brilliancy, resplendence.

def: s.f. = ẓiwā, q.v. s.f. Light; brilliancy, splendour, resplendence.
more: s. f. Light, splendour, brilliancy, resplendence.

def: s.f. contrac. of next, q.v.
more: (from زيد) 1. s. Augmentation, increase, addition, surplus, excess. 2. adj. More, additional, too many, too much, excessive. زياده سر ziyāda-sar, adj. Conceited, too vain of self. زياده سري ziyāda-sar-ī, s. f. Self-conceit, the having too high an opinion of self. زياده طلب ziyāda-t̤alab, Extortioner. زياده طلبي ziyāda-t̤alab-ī, s. f. Seeking more or too much, ambition, covetuousness, extortion, imposition. زياده کرنا ziyāda karnā, 1. To augment, to increase. 2. ( met. ) To take away the dinner and tablecloth. زياده هونا ziyāda honā, To exceed, to surpass.

ety: for A. زيادة; see ziyādat
def: adj. & adv. More, additional; superfluous, redundant; too much, excessive; — superfluously; excessively, &c.
more: adv. and adj. See بـﮩت adv. and adj. 1, 3, 4. ziyādah-tar , Ped. adj. More. ziyādah had-i-adab , To say more would be disrespectful. (The concluding phrase of a native petition). ziyādah khairīyat hai . All's well. (A phrase inserted at the end of a native letter). ziyādah-sitānī , n. f. Extortion; exaction. ziyādah se ziyādah , adv. Too much; overmuch; at its greatest or highest. ziyādah-go , n. m. Opp. of kam-go . A great talker. ziyādah h. , v. n. See برَهنا 1, 3, 5, 8, 16.

m. (from زيد) 1. s. Augmentation, increase, addition, surplus, excess. 2. adj. More, additional, too many, too much, excessive. زياده سر ziyāda-sar, adj. Conceited, too vain of self. زياده سري ziyāda-sar-ī, s. f. Self-conceit, the having too high an opinion of self. زياده طلب ziyāda-t̤alab, Extortioner. زياده طلبي ziyāda-t̤alab-ī, s. f. Seeking more or too much, ambition, covetuousness, extortion, imposition. زياده کرنا ziyāda karnā, 1. To augment, to increase. 2. ( met. ) To take away the dinner and tablecloth. زياده هونا ziyāda honā, To exceed, to surpass.
subs: More would be the extreme limit of respect (i.e. would verge on disrespect, — such is commonly the concluding phrase of a petition in Urdū or Persian)
adj. & s.m. Conceited, too vain of self; — one who has a high opinion of himself; one who engages in an enterprise which he is unable to finish
s.f. The having too high an opinion of self, vanity, self-conceit
adv. Too much, overmuch; at the greatest or highest, at the very most
s.f. Seeking more or too much, inordinate desire; ambition; covetousness; extortion, imposition
v.t. To increase, augment, add (to, -par); (fig.) to take away the dinner and tablecloth (syn. baṛhānā)
v.n. To exceed, be in excess, to abound.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian زیاده (ziyāda), from Arabic زِيَادَة (ziyāda).

ety: for A. زيادة, inf. n. of زيد 'to increase,' &c.
def: s.f. Increase, augmentation, addition, surplus, excess; abundance, superfluity, redundancy; excrescence; — excess, force, violence, oppression, tyranny
more: f. (from زيد) 1. s. Augmentation, increase, addition, surplus, excess. 2. adj. More, additional, too many, too much, excessive. زياده سر ziyāda-sar, adj. Conceited, too vain of self. زياده سري ziyāda-sar-ī, s. f. Self-conceit, the having too high an opinion of self. زياده طلب ziyāda-t̤alab, Extortioner. زياده طلبي ziyāda-t̤alab-ī, s. f. Seeking more or too much, ambition, covetuousness, extortion, imposition. زياده کرنا ziyāda karnā, 1. To augment, to increase. 2. ( met. ) To take away the dinner and tablecloth. زياده هونا ziyāda honā, To exceed, to surpass.

ety: for A. زيادة, inf. n. of زيد 'to increase,' &c.
def: s.f. Increase, augmentation, addition, surplus, excess; abundance, superfluity, redundancy; excrescence; — excess, force, violence, oppression, tyranny
more: n. f. 1. See برَهوتري 1, 2. under برَهنا 2. Force; oppression; tyranny. ziyādtī k. , v. n. To use force ( zabar-dastī k ).

f. (from زيد) 1. s. Augmentation, increase, addition, surplus, excess. 2. adj. More, additional, too many, too much, excessive. زياده سر ziyāda-sar, adj. Conceited, too vain of self. زياده سري ziyāda-sar-ī, s. f. Self-conceit, the having too high an opinion of self. زياده طلب ziyāda-t̤alab, Extortioner. زياده طلبي ziyāda-t̤alab-ī, s. f. Seeking more or too much, ambition, covetuousness, extortion, imposition. زياده کرنا ziyāda karnā, 1. To augment, to increase. 2. ( met. ) To take away the dinner and tablecloth. زياده هونا ziyāda honā, To exceed, to surpass.
ex: موٹروے پر پیش آنے والے زیادتی کیس کا حیران اور اور ڈرامائی ڈراپ سین ہو گیا۔
a shocking and dramatic drop in the rape case that occurred on the motorway.
ہمارے کاموں میں جو زیادتیاں ہم سے ہو گئی ہیں اُن سے درگزر فرما
Forgive us for our transgressions which we have committed [in our deeds]
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian زیادتی (ziyādatī), from Arabic زِيَادَة (ziyāda). By surface analysis, زِیادَت (ziyādat, “increase”) + ی (ī). First attested in c. 1697 as Middle Hindi زیادتی (zyadty /⁠ziyādatī⁠/).

ety: for A. ضيافة, inf. n. of ضيف 'to become the guest of'
def: s.f. An entertainment, a feast, banquet; hospitality; invitation
more: n. f. ضيف entertaining. A grand feast ( dāvat ). ziyāfat k. , v. a. See dāvat k . Ziyāfat nahīṅ kī, ḍokre kā sarādh kīyā hai! No feast this is, a funeral dole to his ancestor!
s. f. 1. A feast, a banquet, convivial entertainment. 2. Hospitality. 3. Invitation. ضيافت کرنا ẓiyāfat karnā, To entertain, to feast, treat.
subs: (-kī), To give an entertainment or banquet (to), to entertain, to feast, to treat.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ضِیَافَت (ziyāfat), borrowed from Arabic ضِيَافَة (ḍiyāfa), from ضَافَ (ḍāfa).

def: n. m. 1. Loss; damage. 2. Hurt; harm; injury. Nādān kī dostī, jī kā ziyān . Prov. The friendship of the ignorant is the loss of life. ziyāṅ uṭhānā , v. n. To suffer a loss. sūd o ziyāṅ , Ped. for nafa o nuqsān , Profit and loss.

ety: Pārsī zyãn; Pehl. ziyān; Zend zyāna, rt. zyā = S. हा; S. हानि = Zend zyāni
def: s.m. Deficiency, loss, damage, detriment; hurt, harm, injury, mischief
more: s. m. Hurt, harm, injury, mischief, detriment, damage, deficiency, loss. زيان کار ziyān-ḳār, adj. Doing mischief, mischievous, hurtful, injurious. زيان کاري ziyān-kār-ī, s. f. The doing mischief, the occasioning of loss or damage, hurtfulness, mischievousness. زيان کرنا ziyān karnā, To cause the harm, hurt, injury, damage, &c. (of), to injure, &c.
subs: adj. & s.m. Doing mischief, mischievous, noxious, hurtful, injurious, destructive; — a mischievous person; a destroyer, &c.
s.f. The doing mischief, occasioning of loss or damage, hurtfulness, mischievousness, injury
(-kā), To cause the harm or injury (of), to harm, hurt, injure, damage.

ety: for A. زيارة, inf. n. of زور 'to visit'
def: s.f. Visiting (a shrine, &c.), pilgrimage
more: n. f. زور visited, honored. Pilgrimage (H. jāttrā ). Zyārat-i-buzurgāṅ, kafārat-i-gunāh . P. Prov. Who pilgrimage to saint's shrine undertakes for all his sins atonement makes. ziyārat k. , v. n. To go on a pilgrimage. ziyārat-gāh , n. f. Place of resort or pilgrimage.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian زِیَارَت (ziyārat), borrowed from Arabic زِيَارَة (ziyāra).

ety: rel. n. fr. ziyārat
def: s.m. Pilgrim.
more: Illit. n. m. A pilgrim (H. jāttrī ).

ety: v.n. fr. ذعف 'to give poison'
def: s.m. Poison, deadly poison (pl. ذعف ẕǒʻuf).
more: (from ذعف ẕaʼaﻌfa, To give poison) s. m. Deadly venom. (Plur. ذعف ẕuʼuﻌf ).

ety: v.n. fr. زعف 'to kill on the spot'
def: s.m. Speedy or sudden death (by poison).
more: (from زعف) s. m. Sudden death (by poison).

def: s.m. pl. (of ẓaʻīf, q.v.), Weak persons, the weak, &c.

(in Arabic) z̤ā (called z̤ā-ě-mǒʻjama or z̤ā-ě-manqūt̤a), the twenty-third letter of the Urdū alphabet (the seventeenth of the Arabic, from which it is taken). It occurs only in words borrowed from the Arabic, or in the secondary (Persian and Hindūstānī) formations from such words. By the Arabs it is usually pronounced like a strongly articulated palatal z, or (by some) like ض ẓ; but the Persians and the Mohammadans of Hindūstān give it the sound of ز z. As a numeral it denotes 900.
more: called zāë mojama or zāë manqūtā , the 17th letter of the Alphabet. It does not occur in pure Persian, nor has it any corresponding character in the Sanskrit or Hindī alphabet. In abjad it stands for 900.

the seventeenth letter of the Arabic alphabet, does not occur in pure Persian, nor has it any corresponding character in the Sanskrit alphabet. In the notation of numbers by the Arabic letters, it stands for 900. It is one of the radical letters; and, when it commences a verbal root, the servile ت in the measure تفعّل or تفاعل or افتعال may be changed into ظ and joined with the radical, in such wise as has been described, under ط, to be allowed with respect to that letter.

ety: inf. n. of ضعف 'to be or become weak,' &c.
def: s.m. Weakness of intellect; unsoundness of mind.
more: n. m. Illit. zāf ; Rus. jāph , ضعف was feeble. 1. Debility, infirmity; imbecility of mind or body. 2. Swoon ( gash ). zof-ul-aql . Mental imbecility; unsound mind. zof ānā , v. n. To faint fall; fall into a swoon. zof-i-basārat ; H. dhund , Weakness of sight. zof-i-jismānī yā badanī . Debility. zof-i-jigar . Feeble action of the liver. zof-i-khilqī, yā tabaī . Natural infirmity. zof-i-dil . Weak action of the heart. zof-i-dimāg . Weakness of the brain. zof-i-masānah . Irritability of the bladder. zof-i-medā . Weak digestion; dyspepsia.
s. m. Infirmity, weakness, imbecility of mind or body.

def: n. m. The back; the upper or outer portion, as the outer fold of a letter. zohr-i-saman par . On the back of a summons.
more: n. m. Afternoon (a little after twelve). zuhar kī namāz, zuhar , n. f. The afternoon prayer.
s. m. Midday, or a little time after the sun has passed the meridian when it is most sultry. ¶ z̤ahr, s. f. The back.

ety: v.n. fr. ظہر
def: s.m. The time immediately after the declining of the sun, mid-day, noon, afternoon; — the mid-day or afternoon prayer ( = z̤ǒhr-kī namāz).

ety: for A. زهرة zǒharat, v.n. fr. زهر 'to shine,' &c.
def: s.f. (m. ?), The planet Venus

ety: inf. n. of زعم 'to assert'
def: s.m. Asserting, assertion; thinking, presuming, speaking from belief; — self-assertion; presumption, assurance, arrogance; pride, vanity.
more: s. m. 1. Thinking, opinion, presuming, presumption, speaking from belief. 2. Vanity, arrogance, assurance.

ety: old P. zura; Pehl. zavār; Zend zura, zāvare, rt. zu = S. जु
def: s.m. Strength, power, vigour, virtue; force, strong effort, exertion, strain; stress; weight; violence; coercion; — adv. Vigorously, powerfully; violently, forcibly; extremely, very
more: n. m. 1. See bal , 7. Khudā kare terā zorā ḍhaë jāë .! Wom. 2. Exertion; strain; effort. 3. Coercion ( dabāo ). 4. Stress; accent; emphasis. 5. Virtue; influence; interest; authority. 6. ( Met .) Force; power; cogency.

adj. Great; much. Gājreṅ zor mīṭhiyāṅ! Delhi Street cry. zor āzmānā , v. a. To try one's strength; to contend. Jākar unhoṅ ke ghar par jab zor āzmāveṅ, Woh gar divāl kūdeṅ, ham koṭhā phāṅd jāveṅ! The old man boastful. Nazīr. When to his house I went my strength 'gainst his to pit, He cleared a wall, when I just cleared the house quite fit. zor-āzmāī , n. f. Trial of strength; wrestling. zorā-zorī, jorā-jorī , adv. By force ( zabar-dastī ). zor ulaṭ , n. m. A counter force of pressure. zor ānā , v. n. To grow strong or stronger. zor-āvur ; Pop. zor-āvar ; adj. Strong; powerful. zor-āvurī ; Pop. zor-āvarī , n. f. Force; power. zor-bāzū se , adv. By the strength of one's own arms. zor paṛat . ( Mech .) The moment of a force. zor paṛnā , v. n. 1. To be impressed by a force. 2. To be strained (the eyes). Jhuk-ke paṛhne se āṅkhoṅ par zor paṛtā hai . 3. To be forced, compelled. zor-phal . ( Mec…

s. m. Force, strength, virtue, power, vigour, violence, effort, weight; adv. Forcibly, violently, vigorously, extremely. زورآزمائي zor-āzmā-ī, s. f. Trial of strength, wrestling. زورآور zor-āwar, adj. Powerful, strong. زورآوري zor-āwar-ī, s. f. Power, force. زوردينا zor-denā, To aid, support, assist, strengthen. زورکرنا zor karnā, 1. To compel, to force. 2. To exercise. 3. To use effort, to exert oneself. زورمارنا zor-mārnā, To endeavour, strive, toil, struggle. زورور zor-war, Strong.
subs: (-ko), To acquire strength, to grow strong or stronger
s.f. Power, force; — adv. By force, violently
adv. By the strength of (one's own) arm
v.n. To gain strength, to reach or attain full strength
(-par), Strain to fall (on), to be strained (as the eyes); to be forced, be compelled
(apnā), To display one's strength, or one's power or authority; — to represent a force (in Mechanics)
(apnā), To use force, to use coercion
(-par), To have power (over), to have authority or influence
adv. With force or pressure; with stress or emphasis
(-ko, or -par), To give strength or force (to), to strengthen, impart vigour (to); to lay stress (on), to emphasize; to assist, aid, support; to corroborate, confirm
(-par), To put pressure (on), to press or bear (upon), to coerce, compel
adv. By force, forcibly, violently, severely, heavily, swiftly, grievously, excessively
adv. With great force; with much ado, with great pomp
adj. (f. -ī), Strong, powerful, vigorous; violent, severe; heavy; loud, &c.
(-par), To use force or effort, to exert oneself; to exercise; to use force (against), to compel, to force; — to gather strength, to make head, to be on the increase
s.f. (in Mech.) Moment of a force
(in Mech.) The line (of a diagram) showing the direction of a force
(in Mech.) The point of application of a force
(in Mech.) The line of action of a force
and zor mārnā, v.n. To apply, or to put forth, strength, to use effort; to endeavour, strive hard; to toil, struggle
v.n. To acquire strength, to attain full strength
v.n. To be well exercised, to be in good (physical or muscular) form; to be in (one's) prime
wety: From Classical Persian زور (zōr, “strength, force; power, might”).

def: s.f. Power, force ( = zor, q.v.). s.m. Strength, power, vigour, virtue; force, strong effort, exertion, strain; stress; weight; violence; coercion; — adv. Vigorously, powerfully; violently, forcibly; extremely, very
subs: (-ko), To acquire strength, to grow strong or stronger

ety: zor, q.v.+īn = Zend aff. aêna = S. इन्
def: adj. Strong, powerful.

s.m. Possessor, owner, lord, master; — adj. Having, possessing, possessed of, endowed with (always used as a prefixed noun, in comp.; and contracted to ẕu, in pronunciation, before the Arabic article; see ẕawī, and ẕī)
more: A lord, a master, (in compos. implying) possessed of, or endowed with; as, ذوالجلال ẕu-l-jalāl, Possessed of glory, glorious. ذوالفقار ẕu-l-faḳār, A sword possessed by Muḥammad, and afterwards by Aﻌlī. ذوالمنن ẕu-l-minan, Possessor of obligations (epithet of the Deity). ذوذنب ẕū-ẕanab, adj. Tailed, having a tail (a star).
subs: adj. & s.m. Four-sided, quadrilateral; — a quadrilateral
adj. Possessed of dignity, or majesty, or glory; majestic, glorious
adj. & s.m. Having wings, winged; — ʻthe winged one,' name of the horse of Husain, son of 'Alī

s.m. 'The possessor (cleaver) of the vertebræ,' name of the celebrated sword of Al-ʻās-bin-Munabbih, an unbeliever who was slain in the battle of Badar; it became the property of Mohammad, and afterwards fell into the possession of his son-in-law ʻAlī
adj. & s.m. Bicornous; — lord or possessor of the two horns (i.e. the East and West), an epithet of Alexander the Great
s.m. 'Possessor of obligations,' an epithet of the Deity
adj. & s.m. Having a tail, tailed; — a comet
adj. & s.m. Acquainted with the sciences, learned, accomplished; — a learned or accomplished person; (ironic.) an astute or artful person, a knowing fellow
(prob. corr. of ẕuʼl-maʻnain), s.m. Pun, joke, double entendre.

def: A quadrilateral figure.
( Math .) Common multiple.
more: ( Math .) Least common multiple; L. C. M.

ety: v.n. fr. زبد, 'to feed with fresh butter'
def: s.m. Fresh butter; cream; the best (of anything).
more: (from زبد To churn) s. m. 1. The best of any thing. 2. Butter.

ety: for A. زبدة, a piece of fresh butter'
def: s.m. Fresh butter; cream; the best (of anything).
more: (from زبد To churn) s. m. 1. The best of any thing. 2. Butter.

ety: Pehl. zūt; Zend zūta, rt. zu; S. जूतं, rt. जु
def: adj. & adv. Quick, swift; quickly, soon; swiftly; suddenly
more: adv. Quick, swift, soon, suddenly. زود رنج zūd-ranj, adj. Irascible, soon irritated.
subs: adj. Easily grieved or vexed, pettish, touchy; sensitive; irascible
adj. Of quick perception, intelligent; sharp-witted, acute
s.f. Quickness of perception, intelligence, acuteness

def: adv. Quickly ( jald ). zūd-ranj , adj. 1. Sensitive. 2. Irascible ( tunakmizāj ). zūd-ras, zūd-fahm . adj. Quick of understanding. zūd-navīs , n. m. A fast writer.
s.f. Quickness, swiftness, speed, celerity.
intj. Tush! pish! ( tuf ). Zūf terī sufaid ḍāṛhī pe! Shame on this grey beard!

ety: prob. fr. Gr. ὕσσωπος; Heb. êsôbh
def: s.f. (m. ?) Hyssop, Hyssopus officinalis.

ety: prob. fr. Gr. ὕσσωπος; Heb. êsôbh
def: s.f. (m. ?) Hyssop, Hyssopus officinalis.
n. m. Hyssop; hyssopus officinalis .

ety: cf. S. अङ्गार
def: s.m. Live coal; charcoal (also written zag̠ār).
s.m. The early part of the forenoon (after sunrise, i.e. the brightest part of the day); breakfast-time
more: (from ضحو To be exposed to the sun. Heb. To be white or shining) s. m. Breakfast-time, that part of the day, about half-way between sunrise and meridian (i. e. the brightest part of the day). عيد الضحا īﻌdu-ẓ-ẓuḥā, s. f. Name of a festival celebrated on the 10th of ẕī-ḥijja, when an animal is sacrificed in commemoration of Abrahamʼs sacrifice of his son Ismaʼīﻌl, according to the Musalmāns.
subs: s.f. 'The festival of the victims' ( = ʻīduʼl-aẓḥā), a festival celebrated on the tenth of ẕī-ḥijja, when an animal is sacrificed in commemoration of Abraham's sacrifice of his son Ishmael, according to the Musalmāns.

def: s.m. The early part of the forenoon (after sunrise, i.e. the brightest part of the day); breakfast-time
subs: s.f. 'The festival of the victims' ( = ʻīduʼl-aẓḥā), a festival celebrated on the tenth of ẕī-ḥijja, when an animal is sacrificed in commemoration of Abraham's sacrifice of his son Ishmael, according to the Musalmāns.

def: s.m. The planet Saturn.

ety: inf. n. of زهد 'to abstain from'
def: s.m. Abstinence; continence; devotion
more: s. m. Continence, devotion, abstinence. زهد کيش zuhd-kesh, adj. Devout, continent.

def: s.m. pl. (of zāhid, q.v.), Religious men, devotees.
more: s. plur. of زاهد zāhid, q. v.

ety: inf. n. of ذهل 'to forget'
def: s.m. Forgetting, oblivion; neglecting, leaving (cf. ẕahl).

ety: inf. n. of ظہر 'to appear,' &c.
def: s.m. Appearing, arising, springing up; appearance, manifestation, visibility; coming to pass
subs: v.n. To become apparent or manifest, to appear, to arise, to come to pass, to present itself
v.t. To cause to appear, to render visible, to bring to pass, bring about
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ظُهُور (zuhūr). First attested in c. 1635 as Middle Hindi ظہور (z̤hvr).

def: n. m. 1. Accruing or arising (as a cause of action). 2. Manifestation; appearance; coming to pass. zuhūr bināë dāvā . Cause of action. zuhūr meṅ ānā , v. n. To arise ( udaë h. , and bītnā , 2). zuhūr meṅ lānā , v. a. To render visible; cause to appear; bring about. zahūr h., yā pānā , v. n. 1. See zāhir honā . 2. To arise; appear. 3. To come to be; come into existence.
more: s. m. Appearing, arising, manifestation, visibility, coming to pass.

def: 1. Auspiciousness; grace. Āp hī kā zahūrā hai! 2. Light; life; ornament. 3. ( Slang ) A son.

ety: corr. fr. A. z̤uhūr
def: s.m. (colloq.) Auspicious appearance, auspiciousness, grace; glory, fame; light; ornament.
v. n. (dakh.) To become manifest, to appear.

ety: v.n. fr. زجّ 'to pierce,' &c.
def: s.m. Glass; a glass, or cup; a glass flask or bottle.

ety: fr. ذکو 'to flame, blaze'
def: s.m. The sun.

ety: v.n. fr. زکم
def: s.m. Catarrh, rheum, defluxion, a cold in the head
more: n. m. Rheum; catarrh; a cold in the head. zukām bigaṛnā , v. n. 1. To become thick and clotted (rheum). 2. To be suddenly stopped (the flow of rheum). zukām h. , v. n. To take cold in the head. Meṅḍkī ko bhī zukām huā . Prov. The frog too has a cold! (A sailor, and afraid of the sea!).
(from زکم) s. m. Rheum, defluxion, catarrh, a cold.
subs: v.n. The defluxion from the head to be suddenly stopped; the rheum to become thick and clotted
(-ko), To have or take a cold.

def: s. (dakh.) Catarrh, a cold ( Harris ): see زکام zukām.
s.m. = ẕaḵẖīra, q.v. s.m. A thing hoarded, treasured, or laid up; treasure, hoard; provisions, victuals, stores, munition
more: s. m. Treasure, provisions, victuals, stores, munition.
subs: v.t. To treasure, store up, lay up.

def: s.m. pl. of ẕakar, q.v.; and see next.

ety: for A. ذکورة ẕukūrat, pl. of ẕakar
def: s.m. Males; the male sex.

ety: prob. the A. dim. of زلخا, fem. of ازلخ; rt. زلخ 'to slip'
def: s.f. Name of Potiphar's wife (whose passion for Joseph is much celebrated in the East, particularly in the elegant Persian poems by Nazāmī and Jāmī).
more: n. prop. The name of Potipharʼs wife.

ety: v.n. fr. زلّ 'to slip'; 'to run,' &c.
def: adj. & s.m. Cool, cold, sweet, pure, or limpid (water); — pure water, &c.
more: adj. زل moving. pure; clear (water). Āb-i-zulāl .
(from زلّ) adj. Pure, limpid, wholesome (water); s. m. Water of that quality.

def: s.m. The cholic.

ety: said to be deriv. fr. A. zulaf, pl. of zulfat, 'a portion of the first part of the night'; but prob. akin to S. गुल्म, or गुम्फ
def: s.f. A curling lock (hanging down upon the temple or over the ear), side-lock, curl, ringlet, lock, tress; tuft; knot; whisker
more: n. f. A lock of hair; love lock; curl; ringlet; tresses. Julaf us ke chehre pe bal khā rahī hai, Ki jūṅ nāṅd meṅ bhaiṅs khal khā rahī hai . The curls about her face are curved and bent, As buffalo stoops upon oil-cakes intent. (A satire on the poetical similes of rustics). ham-zulf ; H. sāṛhū , n. m. The wife's sister's husband.

s. f. A curling lock, a ringlet, whisker. زلف پريشان zulf-i-pareshān, Dishevelled locks. زلف تابدار zulf-i-tāb-dār, Curling locks. زلف دراز zulf-i-darāz, Long locks. زلف عنبرين zulf-i-aﻌmbarīn, Perfumed (with ambergris) locks.
s. f. A side lock (of hair).
subs: s.f. Locks perfumed with ambergris, perfumed locks.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian زُلْف (zulf, “hair, specially if dishevelled”). See the Persian entry for more.

ety: zulf+ī = Zend aff. i = S. इ; or contrac. fr. P. zulfīn
def: s.f. A sword-knot; — the chain by which a door is fastened; ring (of a door), bolt.
more: n. f. 1. A door chain to keep the door from being lifted from its place; chain hinges. 2. A sword-knot.
s. m. 1. A swordknot. 2. The chain by which a door is fastened.

ety: inf. n. of ذلّ 'to be base,' &c.
def: s.m. Baseness, meanness, &c. (see ẕillat, and next).
more: (Heb. and Ch. ) s. m. Baseness, meanness. ¶ ẕill, s. m. Gentleness, ease.

ety: for A. ظلة, v.n. fr. ظلّ 'to shade,' &c.
def: s.m. A thing that covers, or shades, or protects; covering; a cloud.
more: s. m. A covering, any thing shady, a cloud.

ety: inf. n. of ظلم 'to act wrongfully,' &c.
def: s.m. Wrong, wrong-doing, injustice, oppression, tyranny; exaction, extortion; violence, outrage, injury; grievance, hardship; a heavy burden, a heavy assessment
more: n. m. 1. Oppression; extortion; tyranny. 2. Violence; force; outrage. 3. Grievance; duress; hardship. 4. A heavy assessment. zulm bar zāt-i-khās . Private injury or wrong. zulm-pesha, zulm-shāar, zulm-kesh , Poet. adj. Tyrannical. zulm-rasīdah, mazlūm , adj. Oppressed. zulm se , adv. Unjustly; tyrannically. zulm-i-sarīh . Flagrant injury; gross injustice. zulm-i-ām . A public wrong. zulm k. , v. a. 1. To oppress; tyrannize. 2. To wrong; injure; extort. zulm o bidat se , adv. Vexatiously. zulm o sitam, yā tāaddī , n. f. Maltreatment.

s. m. Oppression, injustice, tyranny, injury. ظلم رسيده z̤ulm-rasīda, adj. Oppressed. ظلم پيشه z̤ulm-pesha, or ظلم شعار z̤ulm-shiʼāﻌr, or ظلم کيش z̤ulm-kesh, adj. Tyrannical; tyrant, oppressor. ظلم کرنا z̤ulm karnā, To oppress, tyrannise. ظلم گدازي z̤ulm-gudāz-ī, s. f. Dissolving of oppresion, the putting an end to injustice.
subs: adj. & s.m. Practising tyranny, tyrannical; — one whose business is tyranny, a tyrant, an oppressor
adj. & s.m. Oppressed; — one who is oppressed, a victim of tyranny (syn. maz̤lūm)
(-par), To practise oppression or tyranny (on), to oppress, to tyrannize (over), to do wrong (to), to wrong, injure; to practise extortion or exaction (on)
adj. & s.m. = z̤ulm-shěʻār, and z̤ulm-pesha, q.v.
s.f. 'Dissolving of oppression,' putting an end to oppression or injustice.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ظُلْم (zulm), borrowed from Arabic ظُلْم (ẓulm).

def: adj. Dark, obscure.

ety: for A. ظلمة z̤ulmat
def: s.f. Darkness, obscurity.

ety: rel. n. fr. z̤ulm
def: adj. Unjust, addicted to tyranny, oppressive, tyrannical.

ety: for A. ظلمية; z̤ulm+abst. aff. īyat
def: s.f. Iniquity, oppression, tyranny.
s.f. (pl. of z̤ulmat), Darkness, regions of darkness; a dark place where the water of immortality is said to be.
more: n. f. pl. of ظلمت Darkness; regions of darkness, where the water of immortality is said to be. bahr-i-zulmāt, bahr-i-uqyānūs . The Atlantic ocean.
s. f. 1. (Plur. of ظلمت) Darkness. 2. A dark place where the water of immortality is said to be.

ety: for A. زمرة, v.n. fr. زمر 'to pipe,' &c.
def: s.m. Company, body, troop, legion, crowd, multitude, number (of persons).
more: n. m. A company; troop. Yeh bhī to bāgiyoṅ ke zumre meṅ the .
(from زمر Heb. To sing, to play on a flute, &c.: and, perhaps, so named from its buzzing noise) s. m. A troop, a group, crowd, multitude.

ety: prob. = S. स्तम्भकः
def: adj. Styptic, astringent (taste or flavour, &c.; — syn. kaselā).

ety: the arabicized form of P. zumrud = Zend aśmareja? or mareja?; S. मरकतः
def: s.m. The emerald.

ety: zumurrud, q.v.+Zend aff. aêna = S. इन्
def: adj. Of the colour of an emerald.
more: adj. Of the colour of an emerald.

def: n. Cor. of zul-mānain . A pun; a joke; a double entendre. zū-funūn' , An artful person.
adj. (dakh.) Fop, beau: see بانکا bānkā.

ety: prob. fr. Gr. ζωνάρη, or ζωνάριον
def: adj. & s.m. Belted, having on the sacred thread; — one who wears the sacred thread; — a Brāhman
more: n. m. The sacred thread ( janeū ). Dhotī bibīṅ! pothī bibīṅ! dar gulū zunnār! Islām qulī pāṅḍe manam, pūriāṅ biyār! Loins-strip behold! my book behold! and eke the sacred string! A Moslem to a Pānḍa turned! your crisp sweet cakes forth bring! ☞ The story runs that a Mahomedan mendicant being refused any of the dainty food on which some Hindus were feasting, on the ground that he was not of their faith, forthwith changed his attire and came before them in the garb of a Hindu priest. zunnār-dār . One who wears the sacred thread; a Brāhman.
s. f. A belt, the brahmanical thread, a Hindū rosary. (From Gr. ζωνὰριον ).
subs: s.f. Investiture with the Brāhmanical thread.

def: s.m. pl. (of ẕamb), Sins, crimes, misdeeds, &c.
s.m. pl. (of z̤ann, q.v.), Thoughts, opinions, &c.
more: s. m. 1. Suspecting. 2. (plur. of ظنّ) Thoughts, suspicions.

ety: inf. n. of ظنّ; see z̤ann
def: s.m. Thinking, supposing, suspecting.

ety: v.n. fr. زور 'to incline,' &c.
def: s.m. Lie, falsehood, untruth; adulteration; — a false deity, an idol; — hypocrisy, dissimulation, deceit.
more: n. m. زور a lie. 1. A false gloss or coloring. 2. Hypocrisy; dissimulation. Shaitān bhī ādmī hai jo kartā hai makr o zūr, Aur hādī rah-numā hai so hai voh bhī ādmī ! Nazīr. And Satan too is man whose work's deceit and lure, The priest who shows the way is also man, be sure!
s. m. 1. A lie, a falsehood, adulteration. 2. A false deity, an idol. ¶ zaur, s. m. Going on a pilgrimage.
wety: From Classical Persian زور (zōr, “strength, force; power, might”).

ety: for A. ذرارة ẕurārat, v.n. fr. ذرّ 'to scatter, sprinkle'
def: s.m. Particles flying or scattered about of anything grinding or pounding.
more: (from ذرّ To grind, to powder. Heb. To scatter) s. m. Particles scattered from any thing pounding.

def: Visit rarely.

ety: for A. ذرية, fr. ذرّ 'to scatter, spread,' &c.
def: s.f. Progeny, offspring, children, little ones, young ones, descendants, race, stock, seed.
s.f. pl. (of ẓarb, q.v.), Blows, &c.; modes of speech.
more: s. plur. of ضرب ẓarb, q. v.

def: s.m. pl. (of z̤arf), Vessels; — adverbs
subs: China vessels or ware, china, porcelain
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian ظُرُوف (zurūf), from Arabic ظُرُوف (ẓurūf)

def: s.m. Zedoary, Curcuma zerumbet.
more: n. m. An ornamental gourd; zedoary; curcuma zerumbet .
s. Name of a plant, zedoary. (Curcuma zerumbet: Roxb. See As. Res. vol. xi. ).

def: a mistranscription for زيادة ziyādat, q.v.

n. m. 1. Engagement; stipulation (اقرلر 1, 3). 2. See zamānah , 1, 2. 3. Reign ( rāj 1, 5). ahd toṛnā , v. a. To break one's promise or engagement. ahd ṭūṭnā , v. n. To be broken (a contract). ahd-i-hukūmat . In the reign of. ahd-shikan , adj. Faithless to one's word or engagement. ahd-shiknī , n. f. Breach of faith, contract, or engagement; infraction of a treaty. ahd k. , v. a. 1. See iqrār k. , 1, 4. 2. To abjure. 3. To make a vow. ahd karvānā , v. a. To bind; make conditions. ahd meṅ , adv. In the reign of. ahd-nāmah , n. m. A convention; charter; treaty ( iqrār-nāma ). ahd-nāma-i-lijārat . A commercial treaty. ahd-nāmah likhvānā . To bind; oblige by contract. ahd o paimān , n. m. Articles of agreement; treaty of alliance. ahd o paimān k. , v. a. To enter into, or make a convention; make a treaty; make terms or conditions ( iqrār k. , 4). ahd o paimān karne-vāle . The contracting parties.
more: s. m. f. 1. Contract, compact, obligation, promise, treaty. 2. Time, season, conjuncture. عـﮩد شکن aﻌhd-shikan, Promise-breaker, faithless to oneʼs word or engagement. عـﮩد شکني aﻌhd-shikan-ī, s. f. Promise-breaking, breach of faith. عـﮩد کرنا aﻌhd karnā, To promise, to vow. عـﮩد و پيمان کرنا aﻌhd o paimān karnā, To covenant, to bargain. عـﮩد نامه aﻌhd-nāma, A contract, an agreement in writing, charter, articles of peace, &c.

def: n. m. A sluggard. See احدي Hil-ke pānī tak, ajī, pīte nahīṅ, Tum to ahdī se sivā majhul ho! Wom.
adj. 1. Like (اکساں). Yeh donoṅ ain gain haiṅ, ise chhupāo, use nikālo . 2. ( lit . the difference of a dot) Squint-eyed. 3. Having a cataract.

n. m. pl. of عجيت Wonders; curiosities; lions. ajāib, ajāib o garāib , adj. Wonderful; extraordinary. ajāëbāt-i-zamānah . The wonders of the world. ajāib-ul-makhlūqāt , n. m. 1. The wonders of the creation. 2. Monsters; lusus naturae. ajāyab-khānah, ajāib-ghar , n. m. A museum.

n. f. 1. Inability ( bintī ). 2. Humility ( inkisār ). 1. Ājizī sab ko pyārī hai . Prov. Saying. Humility is pleasing to all. 2. Ajizī se kām nikālo . With humility attain your ends. 3. Supplication; helplessness. ājizī k. , v. a. To press eagerly; to supplicate. Bahuterī ājizī kī, par ek na mānī .
n. f. Severalty; separation.

adj. and adv. Separate (الگ adj., 1, 2, 3, 6, 7, 8, 10—12, 14, and alag , adv. 1, 2). alahdah rakhnā , v. a. To appropriate; set apart; segregate. alahdah alahdah , adv. Separately; one by one; apiece. alahdah k. , v. a. To separate (الگ 1, 2, 4-9 12-16, 18.). alahdah h. , v. n. To be separated ( alag h .). māl alahdā k. , To part with a property.
On them.
On him (be) the mercy (of God)!
God bless him.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian عَلَیْهِ السَّلَام (alayh-i s-salām), from Arabic عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ (ʕalayhi s-salāmu).

def: A proceeding; process. amal-dar-āmad k. , v. a. To act upon; observe. amal-dar-āmad h. , v. n. To be acted upon. amal-dastak . Warrant; writ; a deed of conveyance; a certificate of title. amal k., yā amal meṅ lānā , v. a. 1. To put in execution; carry into effect; bring into operation ( bajā lānā ). 2. To act; set to work; transact (business). 3. To use ( istemāl k. , 1 and Phr ., also baratnā , 1). 4. To dispense; administer. 5. To effectuate ( asar k . 1). 6. See amal pānī k. davā kā amal badalnā , v. a. To change the operation of a drug.
adj. Of the color or odour of ambergris.
n. m. Ministerial officer clerks; officials; executive authority.
n. m. John Doe and Richard Roe (زيد).
more: Fictitious names, like John Nokes and Thomas Stiles, used in scholastick or juridical treatises.

def: adv. عن prepos. and قريب 1. Adjoining; adjacent; bordering upon ( pās , 1). 2. Very soon; shortly; nearly; almost. 3. ( anqarīb ānevālā ) About to happen; approaching; imminent; impending; threatening.
more: (عن prepos. and قريب Near) adv. Near, soon, shortly, nearly, almost.

def: v. a. Properly spelt with alif . To applaud; praise. Uskā joṛā dekh-kar sab ash ash karne lage . Wom.
more: To rejoice, to be greatly pleased or contented.

def: The sacrament. ashāë rabbānī ; H. pirbhū bhoj . The Lord's supper.
n. m. 1. Og, king of Bashan. 2. A tall foolish man.

adj. عين the eye. Visible; distinct; conspicuous; clear (ظاﮩر). Ayāṅ rā che bayāṅ? P. Prov. What's plain as day what need to say. ayāṅ k. , v. a. To throw light upon; lay bare or open; unfold; elucidate ( praghaṭ k .).
n. m. pl. اعضم q. v. Member; limb. azv-i-tanāsul , n. m. Membrum virile . azv-shikanī . Mutilation; maiming. azv kā kāṭnā yā bekār k. , v. a. 1. To cut off a limb. 2. To mutilate.

A return; commutation (ادل بدل). Evaz māvaz gilā na dārad . P. Prov. One thing for another is complaint's demurrer. (Exchange is no robbery). evaz māvaz k. , v. a. To interchange ( adlā badlā k . 1). evaz meṅ h. , v. n. To represent; replace; supersede; supplant ( badlī meṅ h .). evaz meṅ, ba-evaz , 1. As compensation or indemnity; in satisfaction. 2. Muṭaṭis mutandis ; in supercession of. evaz-i-nuqsān, tāvān , H. ṭoṭe kī bharautī, ḍanḍ , Indemnity; indemnification. ba-evaz qīmat-i-muaiyan . G. G. At a certain price. evazānā kājī . Sufficient amends.

n. m. Office; duty; occupation; charge ( jagah , 3). ohdah-barā h. , v. n. To discharge a duty; fulfil an engagement. ohdah-barāī , n. f. 1. Discharge of duty; completion of an engagement. 2. See barīyat. ohdah-barāī k. , v. a. 1. To acquit one's self of an obligation. 2. To discharge the duties of an office. ohdah pānā , v. n. To be appointed to an office, entrusted with a commission. ohde par māmūr, yā muqarrar k., ohdah denā , v. a. To appoint to, or instal in an office. ohda-i-jajī , G. G. The office of a judge. ohdah-i-jalīl . An honorable or high place, office, or dignity. ohdeh-dār . An office-holder; officer; functionary; civil or military authority. ohdeh-dār-i-kharch-kunindah . The disbursing officer. ohdeh-dār-i-sarkārī , n. A government official; a public officer. ohdeh-dār-i-mātahat . A subordinate officer. ohdeh-dār-i-māfauq, yā ālā A superior officer. ohdeh-dārī . Holding an office; incumbency. ohdah rakhnā . To hold or fill an office. ohde se bartaraf, yā māzūl h. , v. n. To be dismissed from an office. ohdeh se dast-bar-dār h. , v. n. See istīfā denā. ohda-i-āmil . An executive authority. ohda-i-qāyam-muqāmī . An officiating appointment. ohde ke etabār se, ba-etabār-i-ohdah . By virtue of one's office; ex officio. kisī ohde ke hīle se . G. G. Under color of any office. masrūf ba-kār-i-ohdah ; G. G. H. kām par . On duty.
more: s. m. 1. A commission, an obligation, an agreement. 2. Business, office, post, appointment. (vulg. hudda ). عـﮩده برآ uﻌhda-bar-ā, adj. Performing an engagement or being able to accomplish an undertaking, successful. عـﮩده براٴي uﻌhda-bar-ā-ī, s. f. Completion of an agreement, ability to perform any work or obligation, performance, success. عـﮩده دار uﻌhda-dār, Intrusted with a business, employed, holding a commission, an officer. عـﮩدي سي برآنا uﻌhde se bar ānā, or عـﮩدي سي نکلنا uﻌhde se nikalnā, To be able to perform an engagement or business, to accomplish a business, to succeed in an undertaking.

def: n. m. A fabulous bird.
adj. Naked; bare.
Gamboge.

s.f. Invention, &c. ( = اکت ukat, q.v.). s.f. Speaking, speech, voice, language; story, fabrication, invention, contrivance; inventive power, originality, genius (in these last senses the word is probably derived from the S. udgati; see ugat)
subs: To make up a story, to concoct, fabricate, invent, contrive
To do or perform by means of one's inventive power, to invent, originate, create.

ety: old P. awar; Pehl. apar; Zend upairi; S. उपरि = H. ūpar; par
def: prep. & prefix. On, upon, up, above; at; in, into; with; forth, back, away, against; based upon, according to; on account of. (Prefixed to words it modifies or strengthens the sense, as will appear from the numerous examples which will be found in their proper alphabetical places.)

ety: पैंताना [paiṅtānā, पेंताना peṅtānā [Prk. पायंतअडअओ, or पयंतअडअओ; S. पाद (or पद)+अन्तक+र+कः
def: s.m. The foot part (of a bedstead, tomb, &c. = pāyantī).
more: s. m. The foot of a bed, the side towards the feet.

ety: caus. of taṛapnā; — ā˚ = āw˚ = Prk. आव or आवे = S. आपि
def: v.t. To render uneasy or restless; to put (one) in great agitation; to cause to flutter; to cause to stumble, &c. (see taṛapnā).
more: (causal of تڙپنا) v. a. 1. To put in great agitation. 2. To cause to flutter or stumble.

ety: S. तृष्
def: s.f. Thirst; wish, strong desire ( = tr̤ishā, q.v.).

ety: Prk. मम्मो; S. मर्म
def: s.m. Secret quality; latent power or virtue; power; resources, means; money.
